summary: CTO Directive - Iteration #105: Enhanced Ratehawk sandbox validation with new metrics. ALL TESTS PASSED. Backend: 25/25 pytest tests (100%). Frontend: All new UI elements verified - Supplier Health panel, KPI Dashboard with Drift Rate, Price Consistency, Revalidasyonlar, Sapma Sayisi cards, Drift Severity Dagilimi stacked bar chart, and Price Drift Timeline line chart.

issues: Chart width/height -1 warnings when container not yet rendered - cosmetic issue, charts render correctly once visible

critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/inventory/supplier-health: Returns all 4 suppliers (ratehawk, paximum, wwtatil, tbo) with status (healthy/degraded/down), latency_avg, error_rate, success_rate, availability_rate, last_sync, last_validation
GET /api/inventory/kpi/drift: Returns drift_rate, price_consistency, total_revalidations, drifted_count, severity_breakdown (per supplier), supplier_drift_rates, price_drift_timeline
SUPPLIER_SIMULATION_ALLOWED config flag: Properly defined in config.py (line 111) and used in inventory_sync_service.py _determine_sync_mode()
inventory_sync_service.py _record_supplier_metrics: Enhanced with success_rate_pct and availability_rate_pct calculations

InventorySyncDashboardPage.jsx: New Supplier Health panel with HealthStatusBadge component, KPI Dashboard with 4 stat cards (Drift Rate, Price Consistency, Revalidasyonlar, Sapma Sayisi), Drift Severity Dagilimi stacked BarChart with per-supplier table, Price Drift Timeline LineChart with severity-colored dots
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing inventory sync data from previous iterations. KPI data populated from existing revalidation records (13 total revalidations, 7 drifted).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration #105 adds CTO-requested enhancements: (1) GET /api/inventory/supplier-health returns health status for all 4 suppliers with latency_avg, error_rate, success_rate, availability_rate, last_sync, last_validation, status (healthy/degraded/down). (2) GET /api/inventory/kpi/drift returns drift_rate, price_consistency, total_revalidations, drifted_count, severity_breakdown (per supplier with normal/warning/high/critical counts), supplier_drift_rates (per supplier drift metrics), price_drift_timeline (last 50 revalidations for charting). (3) SUPPLIER_SIMULATION_ALLOWED config flag controls whether simulation fallback is allowed - set to true by default. (4) Frontend KPI Dashboard shows Drift Rate card (53.85% - 7/13 revalidation), Price Consistency card (46.2% = 1-drift_rate), Revalidasyonlar card (13 total), Sapma Sayisi card (7 drift>2%), Drift Severity Dagilimi stacked bar chart with per-supplier breakdown table, Price Drift Timeline line chart with severity-colored dots (green=normal, yellow=warning, orange=high, red=critical). All data is MOCKED/SIMULATED - no real Ratehawk credentials configured.

backend_apis.GET /api/inventory/supplier-health: PASS - Returns all 4 suppliers with health metrics
backend_apis.GET /api/inventory/kpi/drift: PASS - Returns all required KPI fields
backend_apis.POST /api/inventory/sandbox/validate: PASS - Returns not_configured when no credentials
backend_apis.GET /api/inventory/supplier-config: PASS - Returns all 4 suppliers with config
backend_apis.Auth protection (no auth): PASS - All endpoints return 401 without auth

frontend_ui.Drift Severity Dagilimi: PASS - data-testid='kpi-severity-breakdown' with stacked bar chart

mocked_apis.supplier_data: MOCKED - All supplier data is simulated (no real Ratehawk/Paximum/Wwtatil/TBO credentials)
mocked_apis.redis_cache: UNAVAILABLE - Redis not connected, search uses MongoDB fallback
mocked_apis.supplier_health_metrics: Calculated from simulated sync job data
